recovery.rate_limited: Sending too frequently, please wait 60 seconds
recovery.token_invalid: Reset token is invalid or expired
recovery.email_disclaimer: If you did not request this, please ignore this email.

recovery.email_mfa_desc: You are unbinding two-factor authentication (MFA) via email.
recovery.email_mfa_validity: The code is valid for 10 minutes, single use only.
recovery.email_mfa_disclaimer: If you did not request this, please change your password immediately.
terminal.disabled: Remote terminal has been disabled by the administrator
terminal.no_channel: ✗ Cannot establish terminal session — no reverse terminal channel found for this host.
terminal.no_channel_hint_1: 1) Agent version is too old (old versions have no reverse terminal channel) — please reinstall with the latest Agent on this host;
terminal.no_channel_hint_2: 2) Agent failed to collect machine fingerprint at startup (fingerprint is used for terminal channel authentication, check if machine-id / MAC is readable);
terminal.no_channel_hint_3: 3) Host just went offline or Agent is not running.
terminal.timeout: Agent did not connect to the terminal channel within the expected time, disconnected.
terminal.session_not_found: Session does not exist or has ended
playbook.no_target: Target hosts are empty or all offline — please check step target selection and host online status
playbook.step_required: At least one step is required
playbook.connect_failed: Cannot connect to Agent on host %s (possibly offline, Agent version too old, or another terminal/playbook is occupying it)
playbook.abnormal: Command did not finish normally (Agent interrupted or version too old)
playbook.no_pickup: Agent did not pick up the session (no response to the summon)
playbook.sched_bad_interval: Scheduled interval must be at least 1 minute
playbook.sched_bad_time: Scheduled time must be in HH:MM format
remediation.not_pending: This remediation is not awaiting approval
slo.metric_required: Please select a host and metric
agent.fingerprint_failed: Fingerprint authentication failed: not registered or fingerprint mismatch
